data.body: DONE: convergence floors default-ON landed on main (Gerrit change 562, commit 0a6bea0e4, LLM-Review +1 / Verified +1, operator-submitted). Ticket 70c8 closed SIGNED (completion-verifier PASS first attempt); follow-up flag-removal task 49ae now unblocked/open with operator-attested soak AC. Calibration assessment delivered: plan-review = convergence not thresholds (fixed by this change); code-review = too loose (0 finding-blocks in 162 changes, confirmed misses #529/#518/#539; idea 9c04 = ADR-0036 A/B then blocking at ~0.5-0.6 for serious tiers); completion-verifier = admissibility fine, real defects are contagion (bug 02a3), signed-children AC anti-pattern, piecemeal-ratchet FAILs, and unpersisted FAIL verdicts. Emergent bug d9aa (unit tests write real store session logs).
